prestazioni: L15B7 (1.5L DOHC i-VTEC Turbo) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with a Garrett GT2259S turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, and a PRL Motorsports intercooler kit with 50mm core thickness to reduce intake temps by 30°C under boost

Custom ECU reflash via Hondata FlashPro with a bespoke 22psi tune targeting 220whp (stock turbo limit) and 210lb-ft torque, including optimized ignition timing for 98 RON fuel and revised VVT maps for linear power delivery
Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.92 final drive), K-Tuned short shifter with carbon fiber shift knob, and a Fidanza 8lb lightweight flywheel to reduce rotational mass by 40%
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Jazz Crosstar-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, extended 30mm per side for 245/40R18 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x8.5 +35 offset)

Seibon Carbon hood with integrated NACA ducts for L15B7 intercooler airflow, paired with a custom front splitter by Varis Japan (3-piece adjustable) and a Cusco rear diffuser with integrated LED brake cooling ducts

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, custom Mugen shift boot and e-brake handle, and a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with red contrast stitching (Honda Accessory part #08U50-TBA-100B)
